# Post-Incident Review (PIR) Template

## Incident summary

- Incident title:
- Incident lead:
- Date/time:
- Severity:
- Affected systems:

## Customer impact

Describe user impact, duration, and scope.

## Timeline

Capture key events from detection to resolution.

## Root and contributing causes

- Root cause(s):
- Contributing factor(s):

## Detection and response evaluation

- What worked well:
- What slowed response:
- Communication effectiveness:

## Remediation actions

| Action | Owner | Due date | Status |
| ------ | ----- | -------- | ------ |
|        |       |          |        |

## Preventive actions

List longer-term improvements that reduce recurrence risk.

## Follow-up and review

- PIR review date:
- Approver(s):
- Next checkpoint:

Use blameless language and focus on system improvements over individual fault.
